name: ames-dev-mcps
description: Development-focused MCP servers curated by Oliver Ames. Includes Apple Docs, Apple Notifier, macOS Automator, XcodeBuild, Sim Genie, and Sosumi for iOS/macOS development workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Development MCP pack for Apple platform workflows.
interface.longDescription: A curated bundle of Oliver's development-focused MCP servers: Apple Docs for framework reference, Apple Notifier for dev alerts, macOS Automator for scripting and automation, XcodeBuildMCP for builds and testing, Sim Genie for iOS Simulator automation, and Sosumi.
defaultPrompt: Look up this Apple API in Apple Docs.
Build and run the app in the simulator.
Notify me when the build finishes.
